## Outcome

Describe the final operator-visible change and why it is needed.

## Contract surfaces

List affected schemas, tools, services, stages, layers, documentation and compatibility promises. Link the design record when `GOVERNANCE.md` requires one.

## Evidence

List exact checks and runtime evidence. Include the verification repository commit when that repository was used.

## Checklist

- [ ] Public contract changes include compatibility and migration treatment.
- [ ] Source rights, provenance and release semantics remain fail closed.
- [ ] Documentation and generated figures match the implementation.
- [ ] No credentials, private paths or unlicensed source assets are included.
- [ ] Citation, CodeMeta, changelog and support matrix are updated when the release surface changes.
